projectDescription: A WordPress plugin that adds two Elementor widgets — Basic Table Builder and CSV Table Import — for creating responsive, styled tables without code.
keyFeatures: Basic Table Builder widget with up to 20 columns and unlimited rows
CSV Table Import widget supporting inline CSV text or external CSV file URLs
Live search functionality for filtering table rows in real time
DataTables integration providing pagination, sorting, and filtering
Rich Elementor styling controls for typography, colors, borders, spacing, and images
publicApiSurface: CSS class: .tablentor-bt-search — Basic Table search input container
CSS class: .tablentor-table-csv-container — CSV Table outer wrapper
WordPress action: elementor/widgets/widgets_registered (used to register widgets)
